top_signals.title: Saudi Arabia has ramped up oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz since U.S.-Iran deal
top_signals.summary: Saudi Arabia is restarting its export logistics in the Persian Gulf after a three-month pause, according to Kpler.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Warsh Using Strategic Ambiguity: Diczok
top_signals.summary: Matthew Diczok, head of cross-asset market strategy for the Chief Investment Office  within Bank of America, Kelsey Berro, fixed income portfolio manager at JPMorgan Asset Management. joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Canada, Philippines Agree to Sign Trade Deal This Year, Grow Defense Ties
top_signals.summary: Canada and the Philippines plan to finalize a free trade agreement this year, and signed agreements to deepen cooperation on energy, defense, labor and migration, Prime Minister Mark Carney said Thursday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: White House’s Hassett Criticizes Powell for Staying on at Fed - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: White House’s Hassett Criticizes Powell for Staying on at Fed  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
